site.title: Congo
site.subtitle: A graduation sale where buyers guess the price before they unlock it.
site.defaultDescription: Furniture and computer supplies for sale before graduation. Browse the goods, guess the price to unlock a deal, and schedule pickup or delivery by email.
site.sharingTagline: Guess the price. Unlock the deal.
site.deliveryNote: Orders above $50 qualify for free local delivery.
site.pickupNote: Pickup details are coordinated by email after checkout.

items.name: Inland CAT6 UTP Cable, 2-Pack, 10ft
items.description: Two 10ft CAT6 RJ45 Ethernet cables (black and blue), bare copper, still sealed in original packaging.
items.pickupNotes: Small item, easy to bundle with other computer supplies.

items.name: Sony EXTRA BASS SRS-XB23 Bluetooth Speaker
items.description: Portable Sony EXTRA BASS Bluetooth speaker, model SRS-XB23, shown with the original box.
items.pickupNotes: Includes original retail box shown in the photo.

items.name: ASUS ROG Swift PG329Q Monitor
items.description: ASUS ROG Swift PG329Q gaming monitor, box included.
items.pickupNotes: Box included. Additional photos available on request.

items.name: Bose Companion 2 Series III Speakers
items.description: Bose Companion 2 Series III multimedia speaker system with power adapter and attached cabling.
items.pickupNotes: Three photos included: front view, rear connections, and model label.

items.name: Lamicall Laptop Stand
items.description: Adjustable aluminum Lamicall laptop stand, shown with the original box.
items.pickupNotes: Box included in the photo. Reference price uses Lamicall's current similar adjustable foldable laptop stand listing.

items.name: IKEA ELLOVEN Monitor Stand with Drawer
items.description: IKEA ELLOVEN monitor stand with bamboo drawer and white top shelf, shown open and with label visible.
items.pickupNotes: Two photos included: open drawer view and product label/reference sticker.

items.name: ASUS VP28UQG 28-inch 4K Monitor with Table Mount
items.description: ASUS VP28UQG 28-inch 4K monitor mounted on an adjustable table arm. DP cable included.
items.pickupNotes: Includes the table mount arm and a DisplayPort cable. Three photos included: front view, rear/arm view, and model label.

items.name: FlexiSpot Pro Standing Desk (E7) with Govee RGBIC Desk Light
items.description: FlexiSpot Pro Standing Desk (E7) bundle with the included Govee RGBIC desk light shown in the photos.
items.pickupNotes: Bundle includes the FlexiSpot E7 standing desk and the Govee RGBIC desk light shown on the desktop. Four photos included: assembled frame, parts view, full desk view, and close-up accessory view.
